command: echo '=== XRAY CONFIG ===' && cat /usr/local/x-ui/bin/config.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || cat /usr/local/x-ui/bin/config.json 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== X-UI DB INBOUNDS ===' && sqlite3 /etc/x-ui/x-ui.db 'SELECT * FROM inbounds;' 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== X-UI DB SETTINGS ===' && sqlite3 /etc/x-ui/x-ui.db '.headers on' '.mode column' 'SELECT * FROM settings;' 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== TRAEFIK FULL CONFIG ===' && cat /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null | head -80 && echo && echo '=== DOMAINS RESOLVING ===' && for d in marbomebel.ru n8n.marbomebel.ru vpn.marbomebel.ru claw.marbomebel.ru; do echo "$d: $(dig +short $d A 2>/dev/null)"; done
intent: Get Xray config, X-UI DB details, Traefik config, DNS resolution
